name: fresh2
description: Fresh 2 framework reference with complete API documentation, code examples, and migration guide from Fresh 1. Use when working with Fresh framework, Deno web development, island architecture, Preact SSR, routing, file routing, middleware, islands, signals, island props serialization, forms, layouts, static files, Vite integration, deployment, testing, data fetching, error handling, partials, WebSockets, plugins, migration, or any Fresh-related code.

interface.longDescription: Fresh 2 adds up-to-date framework reference material, API patterns, examples, and migration guidance so Codex can avoid outdated Fresh 1 APIs when working in Deno Fresh projects.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the fresh2 skill before changing Fresh, Deno web, Preact route, file routing, island, island props serialization, middleware, static files, Vite, testing, partials, WebSockets, deployment, or migration code. Read the relevant bundled references first and avoid Fresh 1 API patterns.
